base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of player_explosion — a effect_layer (explosion_vfx) from 1981 galaga. small flash. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: 4-frame death explosion — small flash → expanding fire cross → scattered debris → fade; plays on ship-destruction; life removed
